title: How should an audio tutor walk me through Getting Started with Loops?
note: Prompt for another agent to read the article in logical sections, almost verbatim, while adding short context and checking readiness before moving on.
synthesis: Use this prompt to run a spoken guided reading of the article. The tutor should give a brief plain-English frame, read each article section almost verbatim, add simple context and color, ask one useful check-back, and wait for the learner to say they are ready before continuing.

interaction.content:
i want you to break this article up into logical sections, add more context/colour to it, etc

create me a prompt with those sections, so another agent will just talk me through each section in plain and simple terms, engaging me, asking me if ready to move to next - i will be speaking via audio

JUST ENSURE EVERY SINGLE SECTION IS READ TO ME ALMOST VERBATIME

Created a guided audio-reading prompt for the article. It splits the article into logical sections and instructs the tutor to read every section almost verbatim, add brief context, engage through spoken check-backs, and wait before moving on.
